name: bookaride-co-nz
capturedFrom: GateTest Claude session sandbox — outbound .co.nz is proxy-blocked, response is NOT from the real site

findings.message: Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) header missing — protocol downgrade attacks possible
Content-Security-Policy header missing — XSS payloads have free reign
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff missing — MIME-sniffing attacks possible
X-Frame-Options missing — clickjacking surface (unless CSP frame-ancestors covers it)
Referrer-Policy missing — Referer header leaks outbound URL to third parties

note: This is the SANDBOX response, not the real site. The container's network proxy returned 403 for .co.nz. The real baseline must be captured from a machine with unrestricted outbound — typically Craig's laptop or production CI.
